variations.name: Desert Waterfall Refined
variations.description: A refined desert oasis transom design that transforms the geometric saguaro cacti into rock formations with cascading waterfalls. Features three vertical rock columns at varying heights (left, center-tall, right) with water flowing down their faces into a reflective pool at the bottom. The design maintains the warm desert sky gradient while introducing cool water blues, creating a harmonious oasis scene. Corner triangle accents and horizontal banding preserve the prairie-style geometric structure.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <!-- Desert Sky Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="desertSky" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8C895"/>
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#F5DEB3"/>
      <stop offset="80%" stop-color="#DEB887"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D2B48C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Rock Formation Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="rockDark" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#6B5344"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5C4033"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="rockMid" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#A0826D"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9A7B6D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="rockLight" x1="100%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#B8956E"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#A0826D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Water Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="waterFall" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#89CFF0" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#6BB3D9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="poolWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6BB3D9" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#4A90A4" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="mistGradient" x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="0%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8F4F8" stop-opacity="0.7"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F5FAFA" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Vegetation Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="poolVegetation" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A7C59"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2D5A3D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Glass texture filter -->
    <filter id="glassTexture" x="0%" y="0%" width="100%" height="100%">
      <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.04" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
      <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" result="mono"/>
      <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="mono" mode="soft-light"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Water shimmer filter -->
    <filter id="waterShimmer" x="-5%" y="-5%" width="110%" height="110%">
      <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.08" numOctaves="2" result="noise"/>
      <feDisplacementMap in="SourceGraphic" in2="noise" scale="2" xChannelSelector="R" yChannelSelector="G"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background - Desert Sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#desertSky)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame - zinc caming -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- Distant cliff/canyon wall suggestion -->
  <polygon points="0,45 40,35 80,42 120,38 160,40 200,35 240,40 280,36 320,42 320,55 0,55" fill="#C4A67C" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- Horizontal structural lines - caming -->
  <line x1="4" y1="55" x2="316" y2="55" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- LEFT ROCK FORMATION with waterfall -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Rock base shape -->
    <rect x="35" y="30" width="28" height="50" fill="url(#rockMid)"/>
    <rect x="40" y="25" width="18" height="55" fill="url(#rockDark)"/>
    <!-- Rock face detail -->
    <polygon points="35,30 40,25 40,80 35,80" fill="url(#rockLight)"/>
    <polygon points="58,25 63,30 63,80 58,80" fill="#5C4033"/>
    <!-- Waterfall stream -->
    <rect x="46" y="22" width="6" height="58" fill="url(#waterFall)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <rect x="44" y="22" width="2" height="58" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Left rock caming -->
  <rect x="35" y="25" width="28" height="55" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- CENTER ROCK FORMATION - Tallest with main waterfall -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Main rock mass -->
    <rect x="130" y="12" width="60" height="68" fill="url(#rockMid)"/>
    <rect x="138" y="8" width="44" height="72" fill="url(#rockDark)"/>
    <!-- Rock face highlights -->
    <polygon points="130,12 138,8 138,80 130,80" fill="url(#rockLight)"/>
    <polygon points="182,8 190,12 190,80 182,80" fill="#5C4033"/>
    <!-- Ledges -->
    <rect x="135" y="35" width="50" height="4" fill="#A0826D" opacity="0.7"/>
    <rect x="140" y="55" width="40" height="3" fill="#A0826D" opacity="0.6"/>
    <!-- Main waterfall cascade -->
    <rect x="152" y="5" width="16" height="75" fill="url(#waterFall)" opacity="0.9"/>
    <rect x="150" y="5" width="3" height="75" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="167" y="5" width="2" height="75" fill="#6BB3D9" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Spray mist at base -->
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="78" rx="25" ry="8" fill="url(#mistGradient)"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Center rock caming -->
  <rect x="130" y="8" width="60" height="72" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- RIGHT ROCK FORMATION with waterfall -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Rock base shape -->
    <rect x="257" y="28" width="28" height="52" fill="url(#rockMid)"/>
    <rect x="262" y="22" width="18" height="58" fill="url(#rockDark)"/>
    <!-- Rock face detail -->
    <polygon points="257,28 262,22 262,80 257,80" fill="url(#rockLight)"/>
    <polygon points="280,22 285,28 285,80 280,80" fill="#5C4033"/>
    <!-- Waterfall stream -->
    <rect x="268" y="20" width="6" height="60" fill="url(#waterFall)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <rect x="274" y="20" width="2" height="60" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Right rock caming -->
  <rect x="257" y="22" width="28" height="58" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- POOL AT BOTTOM -->
  <g>
    <!-- Pool base -->
    <rect x="25" y="78" width="270" height="18" fill="url(#poolWater)" filter="url(#glassTexture)"/>
    <!-- Pool surface ripples -->
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="82" rx="40" ry="3" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.4"/>
    <ellipse cx="50" cy="84" rx="15" ry="2" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.3"/>
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="85" rx="18" ry="2" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.3"/>
    <!-- Pool edge stones -->
    <rect x="25" y="76" width="270" height="3" fill="#A0826D"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Pool caming -->
  <rect x="25" y="76" width="270" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- VEGETATION at pool edges -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTexture)">
    <!-- Left reeds -->
    <polygon points="20,96 25,75 30,96" fill="url(#poolVegetation)"/>
    <polygon points="28,96 32,78 36,96" fill="#4A7C59"/>
    <polygon points="15,96 18,80 24,96" fill="#2D5A3D"/>
    <!-- Right reeds -->
    <polygon points="290,96 295,76 300,96" fill="url(#poolVegetation)"/>
    <polygon points="298,96 302,79 306,96" fill="#4A7C59"/>
    <polygon points="284,96 288,82 294,96" fill="#2D5A3D"/>
    <!-- Center-left shrubs -->
    <polygon points="85,96 92,82 99,96" fill="#4A7C59" opacity="0.8"/>
    <polygon points="78,96 84,85 90,96" fill="#2D5A3D" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Center-right shrubs -->
    <polygon points="221,96 228,83 235,96" fill="#4A7C59" opacity="0.8"/>
    <polygon points="230,96 236,86 242,96" fill="#2D5A3D" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Vegetation caming -->
  <line x1="15" y1="96" x2="40" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="280" y1="96" x2="310" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- SUN/WATER SOURCE at top -->
  <circle cx="160" cy="-5" r="18" fill="#F5DEB3" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="160" cy="-5" r="12" fill="#E8C895" opacity="0.8"/>

  <!-- Vertical division caming -->
  <line x1="70" y1="4" x2="70" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="120" y1="4" x2="120" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="200" y1="4" x2="200" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="250" y1="4" x2="250" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Corner triangle accents -->
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Horizontal bands - prairie rhythm -->
  <rect x="4" y="50" width="25" height="5" fill="#DEB887" opacity="0.4"/>
  <rect x="291" y="50" width="25" height="5" fill="#DEB887" opacity="0.4"/>

  <!-- Side panel accents -->
  <rect x="8" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="#C4A67C" opacity="0.5"/>
  <rect x="8" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>
  <rect x="300" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="#C4A67C" opacity="0.5"/>
  <rect x="300" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>
</svg>

variations.name: Desert Waterfall Animated
variations.description: An animated version of the desert oasis transom featuring flowing water cascades, gentle pool ripples, and atmospheric mist effects. The waterfalls exhibit a continuous downward flow animation, while the pool surface displays subtle ripple patterns. Optional heat shimmer above the rock formations adds desert authenticity, and mist particles drift upward from where water meets pool.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <!-- Desert Sky Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="desertSkyAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8C895"/>
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#F5DEB3"/>
      <stop offset="80%" stop-color="#DEB887"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D2B48C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Rock Formation Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="rockDarkAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#6B5344"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5C4033"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="rockMidAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#A0826D"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9A7B6D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="rockLightAnim" x1="100%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#B8956E"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#A0826D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Animated Water Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="waterFallAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#89CFF0" stop-opacity="0.9">
        <animate attributeName="stop-opacity" values="0.9;0.7;0.9" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#6BB3D9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="poolWaterAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6BB3D9" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#4A90A4" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="mistGradientAnim" x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="0%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8F4F8" stop-opacity="0.7"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F5FAFA" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Vegetation Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="poolVegetationAnim" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A7C59"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2D5A3D"/>
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Glass texture filter -->
    <filter id="glassTextureAnim" x="0%" y="0%" width="100%" height="100%">
      <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.04" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
      <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" result="mono"/>
      <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="mono" mode="soft-light"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Heat shimmer filter -->
    <filter id="heatShimmer" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="120%">
      <feTurbulence type="turbulence" baseFrequency="0.02" numOctaves="2" result="noise">
        <animate attributeName="baseFrequency" values="0.02;0.025;0.02" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </feTurbulence>
      <feDisplacementMap in="SourceGraphic" in2="noise" scale="1.5" xChannelSelector="R" yChannelSelector="G"/>
    </filter>

    <!-- Water flow pattern -->
    <pattern id="waterFlowPattern" x="0" y="0" width="8" height="16" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect width="8" height="16" fill="#6BB3D9"/>
      <rect x="2" y="0" width="4" height="8" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.6">
        <animate attributeName="y" values="0;16" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </rect>
      <rect x="0" y="8" width="3" height="6" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.4">
        <animate attributeName="y" values="8;24" dur="0.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </rect>
    </pattern>

    <!-- Mist particles pattern -->
    <pattern id="mistParticles" x="0" y="0" width="20" height="20" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <circle cx="5" cy="10" r="1" fill="#E8F4F8" opacity="0.5">
        <animate attributeName="cy" values="20;0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.5;0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </circle>
      <circle cx="15" cy="15" r="0.8" fill="#F5FAFA" opacity="0.4">
        <animate attributeName="cy" values="20;0" dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="0.5s"/>
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.4;0" dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="0.5s"/>
      </circle>
      <circle cx="10" cy="18" r="1.2" fill="#E8F4F8" opacity="0.3">
        <animate attributeName="cy" values="20;0" dur="3.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1s"/>
        <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.3;0" dur="3.5s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="1s"/>
      </circle>
    </pattern>
  </defs>

  <style>
    @keyframes waterFlow {
      0% { transform: translateY(0); }
      100% { transform: translateY(8px); }
    }
    @keyframes ripple {
      0% { rx: 15; opacity: 0.4; }
      50% { rx: 25; opacity: 0.2; }
      100% { rx: 15; opacity: 0.4; }
    }
    @keyframes ripple2 {
      0% { rx: 35; opacity: 0.3; }
      50% { rx: 45; opacity: 0.15; }
      100% { rx: 35; opacity: 0.3; }
    }
    @keyframes mistDrift {
      0% { transform: translateY(0) translateX(0); opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { transform: translateY(-5px) translateX(2px); opacity: 0.3; }
      100% { transform: translateY(-10px) translateX(0); opacity: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes shimmer {
      0% { opacity: 0.4; }
      50% { opacity: 0.6; }
      100% { opacity: 0.4; }
    }
    @keyframes sunPulse {
      0% { r: 12; opacity: 0.8; }
      50% { r: 14; opacity: 0.9; }
      100% { r: 12; opacity: 0.8; }
    }
    .water-stream {
      animation: waterFlow 0.8s linear infinite;
    }
    .ripple1 {
      animation: ripple 3s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .ripple2 {
      animation: ripple2 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .mist {
      animation: mistDrift 4s ease-out infinite;
    }
    .shimmer {
      animation: shimmer 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .sun-inner {
      animation: sunPulse 5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
  </style>

  <!-- Background - Desert Sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#desertSkyAnim)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame - zinc caming -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- Distant cliff/canyon wall with heat shimmer -->
  <g filter="url(#heatShimmer)">
    <polygon points="0,45 40,35 80,42 120,38 160,40 200,35 240,40 280,36 320,42 320,55 0,55" fill="#C4A67C" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Horizontal structural lines - caming -->
  <line x1="4" y1="55" x2="316" y2="55" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- LEFT ROCK FORMATION with animated waterfall -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <!-- Rock base shape -->
    <rect x="35" y="30" width="28" height="50" fill="url(#rockMidAnim)"/>
    <rect x="40" y="25" width="18" height="55" fill="url(#rockDarkAnim)"/>
    <!-- Rock face detail -->
    <polygon points="35,30 40,25 40,80 35,80" fill="url(#rockLightAnim)"/>
    <polygon points="58,25 63,30 63,80 58,80" fill="#5C4033"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Animated waterfall stream -->
  <g clip-path="url(#leftWaterClip)">
    <rect x="44" y="22" width="10" height="58" fill="url(#waterFlowPattern)" opacity="0.85"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="46" y="22" width="6" height="58" fill="url(#waterFallAnim)" opacity="0.7" class="shimmer"/>
  <!-- Left rock caming -->
  <rect x="35" y="25" width="28" height="55" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- CENTER ROCK FORMATION - Tallest with main waterfall -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <!-- Main rock mass -->
    <rect x="130" y="12" width="60" height="68" fill="url(#rockMidAnim)"/>
    <rect x="138" y="8" width="44" height="72" fill="url(#rockDarkAnim)"/>
    <!-- Rock face highlights -->
    <polygon points="130,12 138,8 138,80 130,80" fill="url(#rockLightAnim)"/>
    <polygon points="182,8 190,12 190,80 182,80" fill="#5C4033"/>
    <!-- Ledges -->
    <rect x="135" y="35" width="50" height="4" fill="#A0826D" opacity="0.7"/>
    <rect x="140" y="55" width="40" height="3" fill="#A0826D" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Main animated waterfall cascade -->
  <rect x="150" y="5" width="20" height="75" fill="url(#waterFlowPattern)" opacity="0.9"/>
  <rect x="152" y="5" width="16" height="75" fill="url(#waterFallAnim)" opacity="0.75" class="shimmer"/>
  <rect x="150" y="5" width="3" height="75" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.5" class="shimmer"/>
  <rect x="167" y="5" width="2" height="75" fill="#6BB3D9" opacity="0.4" class="shimmer"/>
  <!-- Animated spray mist at base -->
  <ellipse cx="160" cy="78" rx="30" ry="10" fill="url(#mistParticles)" class="mist"/>
  <ellipse cx="160" cy="78" rx="25" ry="8" fill="url(#mistGradientAnim)" class="mist"/>
  <!-- Center rock caming -->
  <rect x="130" y="8" width="60" height="72" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- RIGHT ROCK FORMATION with animated waterfall -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <!-- Rock base shape -->
    <rect x="257" y="28" width="28" height="52" fill="url(#rockMidAnim)"/>
    <rect x="262" y="22" width="18" height="58" fill="url(#rockDarkAnim)"/>
    <!-- Rock face detail -->
    <polygon points="257,28 262,22 262,80 257,80" fill="url(#rockLightAnim)"/>
    <polygon points="280,22 285,28 285,80 280,80" fill="#5C4033"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Animated waterfall stream -->
  <rect x="266" y="20" width="10" height="60" fill="url(#waterFlowPattern)" opacity="0.85"/>
  <rect x="268" y="20" width="6" height="60" fill="url(#waterFallAnim)" opacity="0.7" class="shimmer"/>
  <!-- Right rock caming -->
  <rect x="257" y="22" width="28" height="58" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- ANIMATED POOL AT BOTTOM -->
  <g>
    <!-- Pool base -->
    <rect x="25" y="78" width="270" height="18" fill="url(#poolWaterAnim)" filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)"/>
    <!-- Animated pool surface ripples -->
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="82" rx="40" ry="3" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.4" class="ripple2"/>
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="82" rx="20" ry="2" fill="#89CFF0" opacity="0.5" class="ripple1"/>
    <ellipse cx="50" cy="84" rx="15" ry="2" fill="#89CFF0" class="ripple1" style="animation-delay: 0.5s;"/>
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="85" rx="18" ry="2" fill="#89CFF0" class="ripple1" style="animation-delay: 1s;"/>
    <!-- Pool edge stones -->
    <rect x="25" y="76" width="270" height="3" fill="#A0826D"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Pool caming -->
  <rect x="25" y="76" width="270" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- VEGETATION at pool edges -->
  <g filter="url(#glassTextureAnim)">
    <!-- Left reeds -->
    <polygon points="20,96 25,75 30,96" fill="url(#poolVegetationAnim)"/>
    <polygon points="28,96 32,78 36,96" fill="#4A7C59"/>
    <polygon points="15,96 18,80 24,96" fill="#2D5A3D"/>
    <!-- Right reeds -->
    <polygon points="290,96 295,76 300,96" fill="url(#poolVegetationAnim)"/>
    <polygon points="298,96 302,79 306,96" fill="#4A7C59"/>
    <polygon points="284,96 288,82 294,96" fill="#2D5A3D"/>
    <!-- Center-left shrubs -->
    <polygon points="85,96 92,82 99,96" fill="#4A7C59" opacity="0.8"/>
    <polygon points="78,96 84,85 90,96" fill="#2D5A3D" opacity="0.7"/>
    <!-- Center-right shrubs -->
    <polygon points="221,96 228,83 235,96" fill="#4A7C59" opacity="0.8"/>
    <polygon points="230,96 236,86 242,96" fill="#2D5A3D" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Vegetation caming -->
  <line x1="15" y1="96" x2="40" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="280" y1="96" x2="310" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- SUN/WATER SOURCE at top with pulse animation -->
  <circle cx="160" cy="-5" r="18" fill="#F5DEB3" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="160" cy="-5" r="12" fill="#E8C895" opacity="0.8" class="sun-inner">
    <animate attributeName="r" values="12;14;12" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.8;0.9;0.8" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>

  <!-- Vertical division caming -->
  <line x1="70" y1="4" x2="70" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="120" y1="4" x2="120" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="200" y1="4" x2="200" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="250" y1="4" x2="250" y2="96" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Corner triangle accents -->
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="8,8 22,8 8,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="#4A7C59"/>
  <polygon points="312,8 298,8 312,22" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="8,92 22,92 8,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="#4A90A4"/>
  <polygon points="312,92 298,92 312,78" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Horizontal bands - prairie rhythm -->
  <rect x="4" y="50" width="25" height="5" fill="#DEB887" opacity="0.4"/>
  <rect x="291" y="50" width="25" height="5" fill="#DEB887" opacity="0.4"/>

  <!-- Side panel accents -->
  <rect x="8" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="#C4A67C" opacity="0.5"/>
  <rect x="8" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>
  <rect x="300" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="#C4A67C" opacity="0.5"/>
  <rect x="300" y="35" width="12" height="25" fill="none" stroke="#3D3226" stroke-width="0.75"/>
</svg>

production_notes:
Design Decisions and Techniques:

1. COMPOSITIONAL TRANSLATION:
   - The three-element vertical composition (left, center-tall, right) is preserved from the Desert Saguaro style
   - Geometric saguaro cacti become geometric rock formations using similar rectangular shapes
   - The center element remains the tallest (dominant focal point)
   - Horizontal banding and corner triangle accents maintain prairie-style structure

2. COLOR PALETTE HARMONY:
   - Rock formations: #8B7355 (warm brown), #A0826D (sandy mid-tone), #5C4033 (shadow brown)
   - Water elements: #4A90A4 (deep water), #6BB3D9 (mid cascade), #89CFF0 (light spray)
   - Pool vegetation: #2D5A3D (deep sage), #4A7C59 (bright sage)
   - Desert sky: Warm gradient from #E8C895 to #D2B48C preserved
   - Mist/spray: #E8F4F8, #F5FAFA for ethereal water effects

3. STAINED GLASS TECHNIQUES:
   - Zinc caming simulation with #3D3226 stroke lines
   - Glass texture filter (feTurbulence + feBlend) for authentic appearance
   - Gradient fills simulate light passing through colored glass
   - Corner triangles in vegetation green (top) and water blue (bottom) create visual balance

4. ANIMATION APPROACH (Variation 2):
   - Water flow: Pattern-based animation with translateY for downward movement
   - Pool ripples: Ellipse rx attribute animation for expanding rings
   - Mist drift: Combined translateY and opacity for rising vapor effect
   - Heat shimmer: feTurbulence filter animation on distant canyon
   - Sun pulse: Radius and opacity animation for living light source
   - All animations use CSS @keyframes for smooth performance

5. STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY:
   - Vertical divider lines at consistent intervals (70, 120, 200, 250)
   - Horizontal baseline at y=55 anchors the composition
   - Pool spans the bottom third, grounding the scene
   - Waterfalls create visual connection from top to bottom

6. SYMBOLISM:
   - The sun at top can be interpreted as water source (origin of falls)
   - Transformation from arid (saguaro) to oasis represents renewal
   - Water blue corner accents at bottom vs. vegetation green at top shows the water cycle
   - Mist rising from pool suggests the cycle continuing
